text: Last class you traveled to Madrid and made polite requests for your trip.
Today you read the contract you signed and talk about its clauses.
Clause
Party
Obligation
Liability
Breach
Term
Warranty
Indemnity
This is the clause that limits our liability.
It is the warranty which covers the software.
The party that signs first keeps a copy.
A breach that is not defined creates risk.
Thank you for joining. I would like to start with the clause that limits our liability.
Of course. That is the clause which sets the limit for each party. What is your concern?
The limit is too high for us. A breach that is small should not create a large obligation.
I understand. We can add a term that links the limit to the type of breach. That is fair.
Thank you. And the warranty which covers the software, could we extend it to twelve months?
Agreed. I will send a new draft that includes the indemnity and the longer warranty by Friday.
Each party must meet its obligations.
Could you send a draft that includes the indemnity?

Hi Simone, this is Daniel from the legal team. I am calling about the new contract with our partner in Germany. Before our review meeting, please read the document carefully. There is one clause that worries me. It is the clause that sets the liability if either party fails to deliver on time. The other party wants a very high limit, and I think that is a risk for us. Also, check the section that lists the obligations of each party, and the part that defines the warranty on the software. If you find any term that is not clear, mark it. A breach of this contract could be very expensive, so we want every clause to be precise. Let us talk after you read it. Thank you, and talk soon.

Hello, this is Simone. I am recording my notes on the new contract, so I do not forget anything before the review. First, there is a clause that limits the liability of each party, and I think the limit is too high for us. Second, the section that lists the obligations is clear, but the deadline that it sets is very tight. Third, the warranty that covers the software lasts only six months, and I would like a longer period. Finally, there is a term that defines a breach, and I want to make it more precise, because a breach that is not well defined creates risk. I will raise these points with the partner at our meeting on Thursday.

Daniel sends the new contract with the German partner and asks Simone to read it. Simone reads the document and marks every clause that is not clear. She notes the clause that limits the liability and the section that lists the obligations. She prepares her questions about the warranty and the definition of a breach. At the review meeting, Simone raises each point with the other party.
